subcodes.first_line: O flame of the fire of the love of God! Upon thee be the glory of God, His bounty and His grace in all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شعله نار محبت الله علیک بهاء الله و جوده و عنایته فی کل الشئون اگر بتوانی
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
